prompt: Produce warm, atmospheric candle and home fragrance product images that sell the feeling of luxury, comfort, and calm. This prompt captures glowing flame light, molten wax texture, the warmth of amber glass, and all the sensory visual cues that make candle buyers click "purchase." Perfect for candle brands, Etsy candle sellers, home fragrance startups, and lifestyle brands wanting imagery that evokes the full sensory experience of their product
